zh.Fenwick Manor, Campsall, Yorkshire, Engl: 英國英格蘭越可爾分維其可
zh.Elsing, Mitford, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可艾爾辛
zh.Gressenhall, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可格雷哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot是Richard Foliot和Joan de Breanal的兒子，於1249年5月2日出生在英國諾福爾可。他於1281年與Margery de Newmarch在英國英格蘭越可爾分維其可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1299年5月2日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可艾爾辛享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot是Richard Foliot和Joan de Breanal的儿子，于1249年5月2日出生在英国諾福爾可。他于1281年与Margery de Newmarch在英国英格兰越可爾分維其可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1299年5月2日在英国英格兰諾福爾可艾爾辛享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot was born on 2 May 1249, in Norfolk, England as the son of Richard Foliot and Joan de Breanal. He married Margery de Newmarch in 1281, in Fenwick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 2 May 1299, in Elsing, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot est né le 2 mai 1249, à Norfolk, Angleterre, fils de Richard Foliot et Joan de Breanal. Il a épousé Margery de Newmarch en 1281, à Fenwick, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1299, à Elsing, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot wurde am 2. Mai 1249 in Norfolk, England, als Sohn von Richard Foliot und Joan de Breanal geboren. Er hat 1281 in Fenwick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Margery de Newmarch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Mai 1299 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Elsing, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot è nato il il 2 maggio 1249 nel Norfolk, England come figlio di Richard Foliot e Joan de Breanal. Lui sposato Margery de Newmarch nel 1281, nel Fenwick, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 maggio 1299, nel Elsing, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliotは1249年5月2日にイギリスノーフォルクでRichard FoliotとJoan de Breanalの息子として生まれた。1281年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアフエンウィックでMargery de Newmarchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1299年5月2日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエルシングで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot(은)는 1249년 5월 2일 영국 노르폴크에서 Richard Foliot(와)과 Joan de Breanal의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 펜윅에서 Margery de Newmarch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1299년 5월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 엘징에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.2 May 1249–2 May 1299: 2 de maio de 1249–2 de maio de 1299
pt.lifeSummary: Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot nasceu em 2 de maio de 1249, em Norfolk, Inglaterra filho de Richard Foliot e Joan de Breanal. Ele casou-se com Margery de Newmarch em 1281, em Fenwick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de maio de 1299, em Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot родился 2 мая 1249 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. Его родителей звали Richard Foliot и Joan de Breanal. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Newmarch в 1281 г. в местности фенвикк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 мая 1299 г. в местности элсинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.2 May 1249–2 May 1299: 2 de mayo de 1249–2 de mayo de 1299
es.lifeSummary: Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot nació el 2 de mayo de 1249, en Norfolk, Inglaterra como hijo de Richard Foliot y Joan de Breanal. Se casó con Margery de Newmarch en 1281, en Fenwick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1299, en Elsing, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
